project.title: MS Western, a Method of Multiplexed Absolute Protein Quantification is a Practical Alternative to Western Blotting
project.projectDescription: Develeopment and application of MS Western method. A new GeLC-MS/MS method is developed for the absolute quantification of proteins.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: GeLC-MS/MS was carried out on the protein of interest
project.dataProcessingProtocol: GeLC-MS/MS was carried out on the protein of interest and the Data was analysed by Mascot, Scaffold, Xcalibur and Progenesis software
